title: Add User Profile Section with Auth Info and Order History

requirements.text: Create a dedicated Profile page (route: /profile) accessible from the site header. The page should display the user's authentication state: if not logged in, show a prompt to sign in via Internet Identity with a sign-in button; if logged in, display the user's principal ID (abbreviated) and a sign-out button.

quotes: A separate profile section where user can access the login or signup information and their orders

acceptanceCriteria: A /profile route exists and renders the Profile page
Unauthenticated users see a sign-in prompt and a button that triggers Internet Identity login
Authenticated users see their abbreviated principal ID displayed
Authenticated users can sign out from the Profile page
The Profile page uses the existing useInternetIdentity hook for auth state

requirements.text: On the Profile page, add an 'My Orders' section that allows authenticated users to look up and view their past orders. Display each order's ID, date placed, total price, item list, and current status. Reuse the existing order retrieval backend query (getOrder) and the OrderStatusTimeline component for each order's status display.
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users on /profile see a 'My Orders' section
Users can enter an order ID to retrieve and display order details on their profile
Each order displays: order ID, date placed, total price, list of items, and current status
OrderStatusTimeline component is used to visualise the order status
Unauthenticated users see a message prompting them to sign in to view orders

requirements.text: Add a 'Profile' navigation link in the site header (Header.tsx) that navigates to /profile. When the user is authenticated, the link or a user avatar/icon should be visually highlighted to indicate a logged-in state. Register the /profile route in App.tsx's router configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: The header contains a 'Profile' link/icon that navigates to /profile
When authenticated, the header profile indicator is visually distinct (e.g., highlighted icon or avatar)
The /profile route is registered in App.tsx
The Profile link is present on both desktop and mobile navigation menus

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
Reuse the existing useInternetIdentity hook for all authentication state management
Reuse the existing useGetOrder query hook for order retrieval
Maintain the existing luxury dark editorial (Jade) visual theme on the Profile page
nonGoals: Storing order history per user in the backend — order lookup is by order ID only
Editing or updating user account information
Adding new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity
A user registration/signup form (Internet Identity handles identity creation)
